- ⚠⚠ Pack all bags tonight — car return 08:00 tomorrow at airport. Leave hotel 07:30.

bookings.subject: Fourvière Basilica
bookings.notes:
- ⚠⚠ TGV departs PONT DE RUNGIS AÉROPORT D'ORLY — NOT Gare de Lyon! Leave hotel 06:45 sharp.
- RER C direction Massy-Palaiseau from Montparnasse (35 min). Allow 75 min total travel time.
- ✅ ibis: Conf 2405980785 · Sakshi Gupta · Check-in 14:00, out May 2 12:00 · $125.98 + $4.39 resort fee at property. NON-REFUNDABLE.
- Buy TCL day pass at Part Dieu (Metro + Tram + Funicular).
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

bookings.subject: Check In
bookings.notes:
- Check out ibis by 12:00. Leave bags at reception, collect before 15:30.
- ✅ BW Saclay: Conf 9091288742844 · $85.40 fully prepaid · $0 at hotel · REFUNDABLE. Arriving ~21:00 noted.
- ⚠ Saclay → CDG tomorrow: ~45 min taxi (30 km). PRE-BOOK TAXI TONIGHT for 05:30!
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

bookings.subject: Arrive SFO — Home! 🏠
bookings.notes:
- Set TWO alarms: 04:45 + 05:00. Pre-book taxi night before (May 2 evening)!
- Saclay → CDG is ~45 min (30 km) — much longer than central Paris. Leave 05:30 sharp.
- Last treat: Ladurée Terminal 2E (macarons 🥐).
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

key_insights.text: Birthday celebration in Paris — Eiffel Tower dinner at Les Ombres, Seine cycling on arrival day
Vivaldi Four Seasons at Karlskirche, Vienna — world-class baroque concert (Apr 22, ticket via Aditya)
Best photo spots: Bir-Hakeim Bridge Paris (golden hour), Hallstatt boat jetty (morning light), Innbrücke colorful houses
Vegetarian-first throughout: Tian Bistro + Tian Restaurant (Michelin), Yamm!, Naschmarkt, mountain-hut käsespätzle
Pack layers — Hallein salt mine is 10°C inside. Cool Alpine mornings in Salzburg and Innsbruck throughout
Critical: Lyon TGV departs Pont de Rungis (NOT Gare de Lyon). Saclay → CDG is 45 min — pre-book taxi May 2 night
Rental car Salzburg Airport Apr 24–26: Hallstatt, Gosau, Hallein. Sunday return 08:00 — confirm key drop procedure
Jazz at Porgy & Bess + Klimt's The Kiss at Belvedere — full cultural day in Vienna (Apr 28, both via Aditya)
